{"society_power": 5.0, "state_power": 2.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "DOIP secular education reform and 1876\u201377 \"War of the Schools\"", "reasoning": "Radical federalism kept the central state feeble, but the 1870 DOIP, German pedagogical mission, and eventual military victory in the War of the Schools marked a modest, contested increase in state reach; export-led growth and intensified Liberal-Conservative mobilization strengthened associational and partisan society despite the war's disruption."}
